name: Myles Bugbee - Bennet for America
subject: Are you hosting a debate watch party?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

You won't want to miss this. On Thursday, Michael will take the stage in Miami to appear in his first presidential debate of the 2020 primary.

This is the first chance for millions of Americans to hear Michael's ambitious and pragmatic plans for driving economic opportunity and restoring integrity to Washington.

This is where YOU come in. Michael is rising to the challenge to tackle our nation's greatest challenges. And we need your help to spread the word across the country.

[Will you help make debate day a success by hosting a watch party in your neighborhood? Sign up now to receive your very own debate watch party toolkit.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba22f/134673f2/1e6fdae/6996d336/2567721859/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://michaelbennet.com/hostajunedebatewatchparty?source=EM_PET_B3_062419_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

name: Supreme Court Watch
subject: The Supreme Court will rule on gerrymandering soon -- and it doesn't look good.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | This week, the Supreme Court is set to issue a ruling on a major case challenging partisan gerrymandering in North Carolina. The decision could affect the distribution of political power in our country for the next decade.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter -- This week, the Supreme Court is set to issue a ruling on a major case challenging partisan gerrymandering in North Carolina. **The decision could affect the distribution of political power in our country for the next decade.** The Supreme Court justices might still be deliberating, but the smoking gun comes straight from the mouth of the GOP legislator who was in charge of the redistricting process in 2016: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0736/72412298/4226dc9a/6101a473/2313987776/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/EndGerrymanderingNow?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1") Republican lawmakers said it loud and clear: **they knowingly and purposely violated voters ' constitutional rights in order to give their party an unfair advantage and secure their hold on power.** [**The Supreme Court 's ruling is coming soon!! We need you to sign this Emergency Petition NOW to say it's time to strike down partisan gerrymandering from the highest court in the land.**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0736/72412298/4226dc9a/6101a472/2313987776/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/EndGerrymanderingNow?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+The+Supreme+Courtrsquos+ruling+is+coming&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1") | | | [Equal Vote for ALL Now](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0736/72412298/4226dc9a/6101a475/2313987776/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/EndGerrymanderingNow?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Equal+Vote+for+ALL+Now&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1")
---
The Supreme Court has never struck down a partisan gerrymander. And with Trump appointee Brett Kavanaugh added to the bench, the conservative justices might use their majority to rule that the federal courts should stay out of partisan gerrymandering cases, period.
If that happens, it will be up to the individual states to strike down gerrymandering. And with the GOP doing everything it can to silence voters, the fight will be harder than ever before.
[**We can 't let Republican lawmakers continue to suppress voters. Tell the Supreme Court justices that they have a duty to uphold our constitutional right to an equal vote RIGHT AWAY!**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0736/72412298/4226dc9a/6101a474/2313987776/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/EndGerrymanderingNow?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+We+canrsquot+let+Republican+lawmakers+co&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1")
| | [Sign NOW >> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0736/72412298/4226dc9a/6101a477/2313987776/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/EndGerrymanderingNow?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Sign+NOW+gtgt+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1")
---
\-- Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0736/72412298/4226dc9a/6101a476/2313987776/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1")

We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0736/72412298/4226dc9a/6101a478/2313987776/VEsO/ "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0736/72412298/4226dc9a/6101a47b/2313987776/VEsP/ "https://voterprotect.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190624_NCgerrymandering_U1_X1")

Exciting news: We've just launched a powerful new tool -- **and because you 're a member of this grassroots team, we wanted to make sure you heard about it first.**

Here's the plan:

We bet you have some people in your life (friends, family, neighbors, carpool buddies) who'd _also_ be interested in supporting Elizabeth. And we _know_ that you're the best person to reach them.

[Ready to get started? Hello,
June is National Gun Violence Awareness Month: a month where we honor the lives taken too soon by senseless gun violence and recommit to working together to end the gun violence that kills far too many Americans every day.
From Parkland to Sandy Hook to Aurora to San Bernardino to Orlando and many, many more, we've got an epidemic on our hands.
Thoughts and prayers simply aren't enough. We have to take action to pass common sense measures to help prevent gun violence.
[**Join Senator Hassan and call on Congress to take real action to address widespread gun violence in this country. Please add your name to our grassroots petition today.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc209/2a380d31/3e64b623/f13de5/1787051105/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/GunViolenceAwarenessMonth/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2019-gun-violence-awareness-up%3Frefcode%3De20190625_gunviolenceja_all")

name: Kamala's husband (Doug)
subject: Date night definitely looks a little different these days
body:
I’m writing from Miami, Florida, where, on Thursday, Kamala will take the
stage for the first round of debates in this presidential primary. When we
kicked off our campaign in January, these debates seemed far away -- but
now, they’re in just a few short days!

Part of my job this week is to help keep Kamala laser-focused on the task
at hand: preparing for debate night. We’ve got to keep our heads in the
game. And right now, a big distraction is another big day that’s right
around the corner: FEC deadline day.

We’re up against our steepest fundraising goal yet: raising $1 million
online before midnight on June 30. Kamala needs to stay focused on debate
prep, not worrying about our major fundraising goal. A contribution (of
any amount!) will be a huge help. Help us out by pitching in a donation to
our campaign today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190625-eoq?refcode=ema190625-4-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=5413_5755789_ZwjNLA&akid=5413%2E5755789%2EZwjNLA ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190625-eoq?refcode=ema190625-4-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&refcode2=5413_5755789_ZwjNLA&akid=5413%2E5755789%2EZwjNLA ]Another Amount

I’ll be honest: It’s
surreal when your spouse runs for president. Date night definitely looks a
little different these days, but we are still trying to maintain our
‘coupledom’ by enjoying whatever time we have together -- even if it’s on
the trail -- and always with a sense of humor.

So much of the power of this campaign is about the smaller moments. The
moments that few people see -- when we’re in the airport or at the coffee
shop -- and people come up to Kamala to talk about how she’s inspired
them. Whether they’re a Dreamer, a public school teacher, a working mom,
or someone who loved what she’s done in Senate hearings, it’s amazing to
see people connect with Kamala as a person and as a candidate for
president.

As more people get to know Kamala, they see what people she meets on the
trail see every day: She’s the real deal. And on Thursday, during her
first debate of this crowded Democratic primary, Kamala will have a chance
to introduce herself to millions of undecided voters across the country.

That’s why I’m reaching out today. Anything you’re able to pitch in before
Sunday’s big deadline will help our campaign introduce the Kamala we know
and love to people across this country.

I’m personally asking you to join us in this fight with a contribution.
You can pitch in right here:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190625-eoq?refcode=ema190625-4-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1007&refcode2=5413_5755789_ZwjNLA&akid=5413%2E5755789%2EZwjNLA ]Chip in $5 now

This grassroots team is amazing. It’s been my honor to get to know you,
work with you, laugh with you, travel all around our great country and
meet you everywhere -- all of us bound by our belief in Kamala, and that
she WILL be the next President of the United States.

Thanks for all you are doing, and I'll be seeing you all again real soon
on the campaign trail!

— Doug (Kamala’s husband)

You can pitch in right here: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]Chip in $5 now [ ]Chip in $25 now [ ]Chip in $50 now [ ]Chip in $100 now [ ]Chip in $250 now [ ]Another Amount This grassroots team is amazing. It’s been my honor to get to know you, work with you, laugh with you, travel all around our great country and meet you everywhere -- all of us bound by our belief in Kamala, and that she WILL be the next President of the United States. Thanks for all you are doing, and I'll be seeing you all again real soon on the campaign trail! — Doug (Kamala’s husband) P.S. here’s our latest selfie from #NationalSelfieDay: You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Robin Hickenlooper
subject: We're counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Your support. Your enthusiasm. Your donations. Your willingness to share John's message with your community. Your faith in an America where we can get progressive things done, together. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771785/691c9bd/6da0ab71/11a4306b/1078773046/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

As the person closest to John, I'll tell you: **He is working his heart out to prepare for his first presidential debate on Thursday.**

Watching your husband get ready to introduce himself to millions of new people is--well, it's got me on pins and needles. It's absolutely nerve-wracking.

**But here 's what's keeping me steady every moment: sheer gratitude for what has earned John the opportunity to present these ideas on the national stage. Simply put, it's the old-fashioned loyalty, generosity and heart of _this team_ that has gotten John this far in the race.**

Your support. Your enthusiasm. Your donations. Your willingness to share John's message with your community. Your faith in an America where we can get progressive things done, together.

I'm getting ready to sit in and watch the last phases of debate preparation (hello again, nerves), but before I do, I'd like to ask one favor.

**In the coming days and weeks, we 'll be relying on this incredible team more than ever. We still have $50,000 to raise to meet our fundraising goal before John debates on Thursday--can you help by chipping in now?** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190625_RH_20190625-fr-RH-steady-ndnr_ndnr_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190625_RH_20190625-fr-RH-steady-ndnr_ndnr_b50&recurring=auto&amount=50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190625_RH_20190625-fr-RH-steady-ndnr_ndnr_b100&recurring=auto&amount=100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190625_RH_20190625-fr-RH-steady-ndnr_ndnr_bother&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Remember: _You got John this far._ How much farther he goes also depends on you. And I've never felt more confident that this team will step up for him.

(Bonus: Everyone who gives before Thursday will be on an official list of Debate Donors that John will see before he takes the stage. I hope you'll be on that list.)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Robin [](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190625_RH_20190625-fr-RH-steady-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton2&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020

Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771785/691c9bd/6da0ab71/11a43060/1078773046/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771785/691c9bd/6da0ab71/11a43061/1078773046/VEsHBA/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771785/691c9bd/6da0ab71/11a4319e/1078773046/VEsHBw/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771785/691c9bd/6da0ab71/11a4319f/1078773046/VEsHBg/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771785/691c9bd/6da0ab71/11a4319c/1078773046/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771785/691c9bd/6da0ab71/11a43063/1078773046/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

Grassroots donors are the only people who make this campaign possible.

Not federal lobbyists or corporate PACs, who have a wish list for the next president -- we don't take a dime from any of them.

body:
#
Hi \-- Beto’s campaign manager here.
Today, we’re setting an ambitious goal: We need to raise $600,000 online before midnight on June 30 -- when we close the books on our FEC deadline and report the money we’ve raised this quarter.
I need to underscore that meeting this goal is incredibly important. Reporters and our opponents will be looking at our numbers to gauge our momentum. Whether or not we meet the goal will determine how much we can spend to keep building a campaign that’s strong enough to win the right way -- no PACs, corporations, lobbyists, or special interests. All people.
[We’re counting on you to help Beto reach our $600,000 goal before the FEC fundraising deadline. Pitch in a $3 contribution right now.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17961?refcode=ema20190625-38681&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=38681%2E444211%2ECVUG0N)

Since day one, the strength of this campaign has been about all the people working together to do something extraordinary for this country. So when we report our fundraising numbers, it’s not just about the amount of money, but about the number of people who chip in to be part of this.
This campaign is about much more than winning the White House. It’s a campaign to change our politics altogether -- to build a new democracy that actually listens to and values every voice, everywhere.
I want those who look at our report to see that every contribution is a message about all the people, from all walks of life, who share those values. But we need as many people as possible reading this to contribute now. If you can, please tell your friends and family too by forwarding this email.
[Help Beto reach our end-of-quarter FEC fundraising goal of raising $600,000 by midnight on June 30 with a donation of $3. It’s going to take all of us.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17961?refcode=ema20190625-38681&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=38681%2E444211%2ECVUG0N)
Together, we can build an historic campaign that can tackle the challenges we face. I’ve been a part of history-making, grassroots campaigns that have won the presidency before. I know we can do this if enough people step up now.
Thank you for everything so far,
Jen O'Malley Dillon

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Our system isn’t built for this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friends,

My family has always been middle class. My parents worked hard to support my younger brothers, my younger sister, and me. But when I was 18, my father was diagnosed with cancer. After he passed away a year later, my mom was left on the verge of bankruptcy, raising 4 kids on her own. I had to work my way through college, and after graduating I signed up for the U.S. Foreign Service. I knew that it would be hard serving overseas, away from my family. I knew that I would never be wealthy. But I believe that public service should be its own reward.

My friend, I believe every one of us has an obligation to stand up for what's right when we see things going wrong, even if it requires big sacrifices. When I saw my own government betraying American values, I had to do something. I resigned my commission from the Foreign Service and a 15 year career and dug into my own retirement to campaign for change back home in Texas.

But a campaign for Congress costs big money. So, I started calling every single friend I had and asked them to help: $50, $100, $200, whatever they could do. And they did. Over 200 people chipped in the first 2 weeks, and that number kept growing. Ten months later, over 7,000 people had contributed to our movement, and we out-raised a 5-term sitting incumbent member of Congress without taking a penny of corporate PAC money.

Middle class people aren't supposed to run for office. We are told that members of Congress are supposed to be wealthy and well-connected. But we need more voices of ordinary citizens in Congress. Help me change that system. **[Please chip in whatever you can before the deadline on Sunday and send a message that our government should be for everyone.](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ACipKL91ek_OBhRCt5P14wrh0Vsl5OrV6C3IKHVnCE=/fFym5F28DooeuQSpHVKlXcFV_lDGEKVT2RkJtz_UOdc=?refcode=0625email) **

Thank you,

Sri Preston Kulkarni

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Administration’s Industry-Recognized Apprenticeships Will Keep America Working
body:
"Through the White House’s Pledge to America’s Workers, job creators around the nation have committed to nearly 10 million..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1b9ffe3255&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Administration’s Industry-Recognized Apprenticeships Will Keep America Working**

“Through the White House’s Pledge to America’s Workers, job creators around the nation have committed to nearly 10 million training, upskilling or reskilling opportunities for American students and workers. Our thriving job market brings with it new challenges, however,” Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump and Labor Secretary Alexander Acosta write in the _Miami Herald_.

“Our economy has 7.4 million open jobs, and for 14 months in a row it has had more job openings than job seekers. As businesses look to fill these jobs, we have an obligation to look for new ways to empower America’s workforce with the in-demand skills that employers need,” they write.

“That is why the Trump administration is proposing a second apprenticeship model: the Industry-Recognized Apprenticeship . . . This program would enable industries to come together through associations, consortia, nonprofits and other mechanisms to offer skills education to American students and workers.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=abf009973a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “This month, the Trump administration served as a catalyst for perhaps the largest criminal justice public-private-partnership ever assembled, jobs for formerly incarcerated people as they reenter society,” John Koufos writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=827b9983c4&e=3ee4985eea). “As a former prisoner myself, this initiative is personal to me . . . Virtually all of my cellmates wanted the dignity of work, so they could support themselves and their families, reunify with their families, and restore their self-worth.” President Trump “understands this challenge and is working to promote second chance hiring to ensure inmates have opportunities to succeed after they have paid their debt to society,” Koufos says.
---
|
---
| “Mexico has deployed almost 15,000 troops to the US-Mexico border, according to the country's Secretary of Defense Luis Sandoval,” Tatiana Arias reports for [CNN](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=058f848a34&e=3ee4985eea). “Many migrants begin their journey in Central America and even further south, passing through Mexico on their way toward the United States. The deployments come after renewed pressure from the Trump administration on Mexico to help slow migration flows northward.”
---
|
---
| “President Trump on Monday signed an executive order demanding the upfront disclosure by hospitals of the actual prices for common tests and procedures,” Andrew O’Reilly reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=490a327471&e=3ee4985eea). “Lack of information on health care prices is a widespread problem. It's confusing for patients, and experts say it's also one of the major factors that push up U.S. costs.” Yesterday’s move is part of the President’s agenda to put American patients first.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e54ee6f1d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e5505a9bd&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=dc4f7271f0)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: MJ Hegar
subject: introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
I'm MJ Hegar. I'm a combat veteran, a mom, and a proud Texan. Maggie said y'all know a thing or two about winning tough fights, so she said I could reach out because I'm running in what you can bet will be one of the closest Senate races in the country.
I've spent my life going head to head with powerful forces, first as an Air Force pilot, and then later when I took on the government for the right of women to serve in ground combat.
Some folks say it's impossible to win in Texas, but I know we can do this, and I'm not one to back down from a fight. And this fight -- to defend our health care, support our veterans, and protect our planet -- is too important not to give it our all.
[**We can win in Texas, but I can 't do it alone. Will you chip in $3 today to help us win in Texas?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc206/2a380d31/3e5d388f/f13a34/416344850/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGVnYXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDYyNV9NV0g0SGVnYXJfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hegar?refcode=e20190625_MWH4Hegar_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
I'm not afraid to stand up to power, but my opponent, Sen. John Cornyn, sure is. For decades, he's let party bosses and corporate lobbyists control his Senate seat at the expense of the people he claims to represent -- and in return outside groups have pledged to spend $25 million to reelect him.
Texans, like many Americans, value independent-mindedness. Our Senator does not reflect that value. He's followed the party line voting to gut health care protections and against legislation to make prescription drugs more affordable.
So I'm running against him to bring our values back to this Senate seat. It's time to show him that his seat belongs to the people -- not the special interests -- and with your help, we're going to take it back.
[**We can do it, but only if we 're in this fight together. If you're with me, pitch in $3.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc206/2a380d31/3e5d388f/f13a34/416344850/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGVnYXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDYyNV9NV0g0SGVnYXJfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hegar?refcode=e20190625_MWH4Hegar_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
We've come so close to victory here, and now's our time -- we're going to take this seat back for the people of Texas.
Let's do this, y'all!
Thanks,
MJ
> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc206/2a380d31/3e5d388f/f13a34/416344850/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGVnYXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDYyNV9NV0g0SGVnYXJfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hegar?refcode=e20190625_MWH4Hegar_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: A sobering thought on Iran, and why it matters for 2020:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a118/6cd27893/4dc7c19d/15807c1f/4132274445/VEsH/ "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Donald Trump and his war hawks have been planning a war against Iran, deploying a carrier strike force and B-52 bombers to the Gulf while looking for a "trigger" to justify an assault. Less than one week ago, it almost happened before Trump made a last second reversal. We must not leave the decision to go to war with this bombastic, mercurial man who conducts foreign policy via Twitter. **Our Constitution protected us from this scenario, giving _Congress_ - not the president - the power to go to war.** That is why I'm fighting for the opportunity to debate Iran on the Senate floor -- so we can reinforce that Trump does not have authority to launch a war. And this is exactly why 2020 is critical. name: Andrew Gillum
subject: a quick story about polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Florida Action,
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb356d/9e00690/6aa3cb80/2407063f/2256790761/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action?refcode=em-header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=062519-es-margin-of-error-rs-fr&source=062519-es-margin-of-error-rs-fr")

You may have seen the latest news coming out of Florida, that the Democratic contenders in the presidential race are polling neck-and-neck with Trump. This new poll shows Trump losing by just one half of a percentage point to the leading Democratic contender, within the poll's margin of error.

**I'll tell you a story about polls.**

What they don't tell you is that no matter how good or how large the sample is, there's always a margin of error, and about one out of every twenty of them are just plain wrong. I've seen the polls show something completely different than what's happening on the ground, and I'm sure you have, as well.

We know that Florida is going to be close, it always is.

**That's why our mission to register and reengage one million voters is so important.**

**[We simply can't afford any margin for error in accomplishing our mission, which is why I'm asking if you can you pitch in before our first quarterly deadline to help ensure we have the proper resources to flip Florida blue and defeat Trump.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb356d/9e00690/6aa3cb80/2407063e/2256790761/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action-eoq-deadline?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=2+-++if+consfirstname+FIRSTNAME+we+else+We+e&utm_campaign=062519-es-margin-of-error-rs-fr&source=062519-es-margin-of-error-rs-fr")**

Trump can't be re-elected if he loses Florida, that's the cold hard truth. The analysts and experts know it, you know it, and Trump knows it, too. That's why there are powerful forces trying to stop us, placing obstacles in our way, and will do anything they can to prevent us from achieving our goal.

But, we can't let their attacks discourage us from standing tall and being a part of building a progressive future that can improve the lives of countless people across our nation.

**We can overcome any obstacle they place in our way and fight back against their attacks, but only if we're in this together.**

**[That's why I'm hoping you can help us flip Florida blue and defeat Trump by pitching in what you can before our first quarterly deadline, which is just days away.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb356d/9e00690/6aa3cb80/24070631/2256790761/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action-eoq-deadline?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=3+-+Thats+why+Im+hoping+you+can+help+us+flip&utm_campaign=062519-es-margin-of-error-rs-fr&source=062519-es-margin-of-error-rs-fr")**

There will be more polling updates, controversial tweets, and personal attacks. But I'm not going to let them distract me from our mission, and I know you won't either. Together, we can move our nation forward.

Our mission is too important to fail.

Andrew Gillum

_[Donate](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb356d/9e00690/6aa3cb80/24070630/2256790761/VEsC/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action-eoq-deadline?refcode=&amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=4+-+Donate&utm_campaign=062519-es-margin-of-error-rs-fr&source=062519-es-margin-of-error-rs-fr")_

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Donald Trump has defrauded the American people
body:
In just a few moments, I’m going to ask you to [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190625-eoq?refcode=ema190625-5-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&t=1001&refcode2=5415_5755789_eODrIG&akid=5415%2E5755789%2EeODrIG ]add
a donation to our campaign for
president. We’re up against our steepest end-of-quarter fundraising goal
yet, and it’s going to take every person stepping up and digging deep to
help us get there.

But first, I want to say thank you. Ever since we launched our campaign a
few months ago, you -- and hundreds of thousands of supporters like you
across the country -- have been informing and helping me be a better
candidate, and you undoubtedly will help me be a better president.

Together, we are making the case for our America. An America where we have
a president of the United States who knows it is a sign of strength not to
beat people down, but to lift people up.

I've spent my career as a prosecutor, and I prosecuted those who prey on
the most vulnerable. I’ve prosecuted murderers and rapists; big banks that
take advantage of hardworking families; pharmaceutical companies that were
preying on people in their most vulnerable moments; for-profit colleges
that were defrauding students.

I want to tell you about somebody who has defrauded the American people:
Donald Trump.

There is a rap sheet full evidence to make the case against four more
years of this administration. Let's look at what happened:

Trump promised health care -- and then he tried to rip health care aware
from millions of people.

Trump said he was for working people -- and then he passed a tax bill
benefiting the top 1% and the biggest corporations in this country.

Trump believes the president of Russia and a North Korean dictator over
the word of the American intelligence community.

And then, after all that, he claims to be the best president we've seen in
a generation. Well, I say let's call Barack Obama because that's identity
fraud.

I have never backed
down from a tough fight in my life, and I’m not going to start now. But if
we’re going to win this thing, we need to clear the next big hurdle in our
path: reaching our steep end-of-quarter fundraising goal of raising $1
million online.

If that number sounds like a lot, it’s because it is. But every dollar we
raise goes directly toward hiring organizers in communities across the
country. It helps us hire critical staff at our headquarters in Baltimore.
It helps us share the story of our campaign with undecided voters in key
states. And it helps me stay out on the campaign trail, meeting with
voters. In short, your donations are literally powering our movement. And
if a whole lot of people step up this week, I know we can reach our goal
-- no matter how steep.

I wouldn’t ask if it didn’t help tremendously. Can you add
a donation to help power our
campaign?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190625-eoq?refcode=ema190625-5-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1002&refcode2=5415_5755789_eODrIG&akid=5415%2E5755789%2EeODrIG ]Chip in $5 now

name: Robin Hickenlooper
subject: John's working his heart out, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Your support. Your enthusiasm. Your donations. Your willingness to share John's message with your community. Your faith in an America where we can get progressive things done, together. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377179f/691c9bd/6da7cb6e/11a42aa8/1337905234/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

As the person closest to John, I'll tell you: **He is working his heart out to prepare for his first presidential debate on Thursday.**

Watching your husband get ready to introduce himself to millions of new people is--well, it's got me on pins and needles. It's absolutely nerve-wracking.

**But here 's what's keeping me steady every moment: sheer gratitude for what has earned John the opportunity to present these ideas on the national stage. Simply put, it's the old-fashioned loyalty, generosity and heart of _this team_ that has gotten John this far in the race.**

Your support. Your enthusiasm. Your donations. Your willingness to share John's message with your community. Your faith in an America where we can get progressive things done, together.

I'm getting ready to sit in and watch the last phases of debate preparation (hello again, nerves), but before I do, I'd like to ask one favor.

**In the coming days and weeks, we 'll be relying on this incredible team more than ever. We still have $50,000 to raise to meet our fundraising goal before John debates on Thursday--can you help by chipping in now?** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190625_RH_20190625-fr-RH-steadybump-ndnr_ndnr_b50&recurring=auto&amount=50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190625_RH_20190625-fr-RH-steadybump-ndnr_ndnr_b100&recurring=auto&amount=100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190625_RH_20190625-fr-RH-steadybump-ndnr_ndnr_bother&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Remember: _You got John this far._ How much farther he goes also depends on you. And I've never felt more confident that this team will step up for him.

(Bonus: Everyone who gives before Thursday will be on an official list of Debate Donors that John will see before he takes the stage. I hope you'll be on that list.)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Robin [](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190625_RH_20190625-fr-RH-steadybump-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton2&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Rising inequality, climate change, and corporate control of our democracy have led us to the waking nightmare that is Donald Trump's presidency.
#
Rising inequality, climate change, and corporate control of our democracy have led us to the waking nightmare that is Donald Trump's presidency.

The only way to pull ourselves out of this downward spiral of authoritarianism is to build a progressive, people-powered grassroots movement that can pass Medicare For All, create debt-free College, and close the income wealth gap (by taxing the millionaires and billionaires their fair share).

[Pitch-in $27 or whatever you can now to ensure that Our Revolution has the grassroots strength to overcome the hurdles ahead:](https://go.ourrevolution. ------Begin Forwarded Message------

In America, we often make the mistake of overvaluing the importance of individual leaders and undervaluing the impact of grassroots movements.

One of the most destructive consequences of this tendency can be seen in the **dangerously naive comments of out-of-touch politicians and pundits who think the underlying problems that led to the election of Donald Trump will magically disappear** if we are able to simply find the best candidate to beat him next November.

[**At Our Revolution, we know that simply defeating Trump is not enough to transform our corrupt system.Help us build the mass grassroots movement necessary to win actual structural, progressive change by chipping in whatever you can by clicking here.**](https://go.ourrevolution. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-june?utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=3+-+At+Our+Revolution+we+know+that+simply+de&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190625_1_3&source=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190625_1_3#&recurring=auto&amount=27&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

**The only way to challenge the structural forces that threaten our survival as a society is to build a grassroots movement powerful enough to challenge establishment control over our politics and economy.**

That's why our mission at Our Revolution is so critical. Together, we are building a national grassroots network of powerful local groups who are fighting to win progressive issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party, and be ready to fight alongside President Bernie Sanders to make lasting structural change.

[**The future of progressive America depends on our ability to mobilize a movement powerful enough to help our next president defeat the corporate elites who will do whatever it takes to maintain the status quo. Can we count on you to chip in $27 now to ensure that we are ready to fight alongside President Sanders?**](https://go.ourrevolution. At Our Revolution, we're not only working to elect Bernie Sanders, but we're also building the movement necessary for long term change, standing up to special interests, and winning concrete victories along the way.

During the first six months of 2019, our **grassroots movement mobilized to get a record number of House Democrats to support Medicare for All** by taking on the insurance and pharmaceutical lobbies; **we organized workers to fight plant closures** by General Motors and other major corporations; **we fought to rollback the DCCC Blacklist** and other Democratic Party policies designed to favor establishment politicians over progressive challengers; and **we won elections up and down the ballot** from the LA School Board to the Philadelphia City Council.

In just two short weeks, the fate of affordable health care for Montanans and millions of people around the country is on the line as oral arguments begin in _Texas v. United States_ before the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals, an explosive case sure to ultimately land at the Supreme Court.
**[Stand with me in the fight for every American's right to health care. name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: checking in on the Texas race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,

I'm MJ Hegar. I'm a combat veteran, a mom, and a proud Texan. Maggie said y'all know a thing or two about winning tough fights, so she said I could reach out because I'm running in what you can bet will be one of the closest Senate races in the country.

I've spent my life going head to head with powerful forces, first as an Air Force pilot, and then later when I took on the government for the right of women to serve in ground combat.

Some folks say it's impossible to win in Texas, but I know we can do this, and I'm not one to back down from a fight. And this fight -- to defend our health care, support our veterans, and protect our planet -- is too important not to give it our all.

We can win in Texas, but I can't do it alone. Will you chip in $3 today to help us win in Texas?

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hegar?refcode=e20190625_MWH4Hegar_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto

I'm not afraid to stand up to power, but my opponent, Sen. John Cornyn, sure is. For decades, he's let party bosses and corporate lobbyists control his Senate seat at the expense of the people he claims to represent -- and in return outside groups have pledged to spend $25 million to reelect him.

Texans, like many Americans, value independent-mindedness. Our Senator does not reflect that value. He's followed the party line voting to gut health care protections and against legislation to make prescription drugs more affordable.

So I'm running against him to bring our values back to this Senate seat. It's time to show him that his seat belongs to the people -- not the special interests -- and with your help, we're going to take it back.

We can do it, but only if we're in this fight together. If you're with me, pitch in $3:

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hegar?refcode=e20190625_MWH4Hegar_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto

We've come so close to victory here, and now's our time -- we're going to take this seat back for the people of Texas.

Let's do this, y'all!

Thanks,

MJ

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hegar?refcode=e20190625_MWH4Hegar_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto

--

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Rob Flaherty, Beto for America
subject: Quick explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in to Beto’s campaign. But first I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why it’s so important.
#
You know where I’m going with this email: I’m about to ask you to chip in to Beto’s campaign. But first I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why it’s so important.
1. We have to finalize our public FEC fundraising report in 5 days (that’s not many days!!).
2. Reporters and every other candidate in the race will see the results in our report either as a sign of strength or weakness for our campaign.
3. We’re building momentum. We felt it on the ground in South Carolina this weekend. But we need to show our work. Your contributions before we put this quarter in the books will show everyone that we’re building something amazing. With ALL people and no PACs, we’ll prove we can win.

But here’s the rub: Right now, we aren’t raising money fast enough to hit our $600,000 goal. I’m emailing you to help us turn that around. **Can you chip in $3 today before our critical FEC deadline? Give at the link below:**
**[http://act.betoorourke.com/go/q2-deadline?t=2&akid;=38750%2E444211%2ETviO3h](http://act.betoorourke.com/go/q2-deadline?t=1&akid=38750%2E444211%2ETviO3h)**
When you chip in, it’s not just the money you’re contributing. It’s inspiration. Because if people see this campaign is cooking with fire and that our grassroots supporters are fired up, they’ll be inspired to give as well. I mean it when I say that every donation today _really_ makes a big difference, especially before our June 30 deadline.
Thanks for all that you do,
Rob Flaherty
Digital Director
Beto for America

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=38750%2E444211%2ETviO3h). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.
